name: Hillary Rodham Clinton
subject: We won New York!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
We're making history together. | Friend --

We just won New York!

We were outspent by more than $2 million, but this team proved that we have the grit and determination to overcome any obstacle in our path.

**[Thank you. I am so grateful for you -- and I know that together, we can secure this nomination once and for all. Will you chip in now to show me you’re with me all the way to the nomination and the White House? (When you make your first donation tonight, we’ll send you a free sticker!)](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUyODQzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgzMDAzMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It's easy to diagnose our country’s problems, but Americans want real solutions and real results.

We’re going to create more good jobs with rising incomes. We’ll give all our kids a good education, no matter what ZIP code they live in. Together, we’ll guarantee equal pay for women, and take on the challenge of systemic racism -- we will finally get comprehensive immigration reform. That’s the kind of real, lasting progress that this team is going to deliver.

Every day, it’s becoming clearer that this may be the most consequential election of our lifetimes. Donald Trump and Ted Cruz have a vision for our country that’s divisive and dangerous -- rounding up immigrants or banning Muslims is just not who we are.

Our country is at its best when we come together. In our darkest moments, we can unite in comfort and strength and lift each other up. That’s what we’re fighting for in this campaign: a nation where we all rise together.

**We took a big step forward today -- and with five big contests next Tuesday, we can’t slow down now. If you’re with me, chip in tonight, and let’s fight for a brighter future and make history together:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyODQzNDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgzMDAzMDMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tonight's results from New York
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we started this campaign, we were down almost 50 points in New York -- the state where Hillary Clinton was elected to two terms in the U.S. Senate.
We didn't get the victory we had hoped for this evening, **but what 's important is that it looks like we're going to win a lot more delegates in New York than any state that voted or caucused before tonight.**
So what does that mean? **Five important states voteone week from tonight, with more delegates at stake than Hillary Clinton led by coming into tonight.** And if we do well next Tuesday, we remain in a position to take the pledged delegate lead when almost 700 delegates are up for grabs on June 7.
As you read this, thousands of supporters are responding to tonight's results with contributions because they believe we can win. I need to know if I can count on you to add yours.
[**If everybody who has signed up to support our campaign made a $2.70 contribution tonight, we will have the resources we need to do very well next week and to take the pledged delegate lead on June 7.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-more-states?refcode=em160419-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-more-states?refcode=em160419-nd")
From the day we started this campaign, the corporate media counted us out. The political establishment and financial elite organized against us. But every great movement in American history faced many of the same obstacles and eventually won because of a simple, timeless human truth: when people come together, when they stand together even through adversity, they win.
And so will we.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-more-states?refcode=em160419-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/5-more-states?refcode=em160419-nd")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: I’m asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend -- It's hard to believe that Pennsylvania has never elected a woman senator. But of course, that's not the only reason I'm supporting Katie McGinty for Senate.

**I 'm supporting Katie because of her long history of fighting for working families.** She fought for clean air and water for our kids as the first woman chair of the White House Council on Environmental Quality, and as Governor Tom Wolf's chief of staff, she fought to expand Medicaid to hundreds of thousands of Pennsylvanians.

**Pennsylvania and our country need Katie. But we don 't have much time to help her win -- her primary is just six days away!**

**[So I'm asking for your support now: Will you pitch in to Katie's Senate campaign before her big primary on April 26th? Help elect a champion for working families and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://act.myngp.com/el/6933414891898273792/-2860607098566213632?refcode=e20160420&refcode2=e20160420nd&amount=25)**

I know firsthand, friend: We need more progressive women in the Senate to pass policies like equal pay and expanded health care access.

We have a great opportunity this year to elect Katie, an incredible leader. But Katie needs us to fight for her now to ensure she has the resources to win her primary next week.

[**Please pitch in now, before Katie 's primary on April 26th. Your donation today could be the difference between winning and losing.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6933414891898273792/-2860607098566213632?refcode=e20160420&refcode2=e20160420nd&amount=25)

Thank you,

Jeanne Shaheen
U.S. Senator for New Hampshire

name: Wayne Campbell
subject: My Son Tyler
body:
| Peter -- More than 120 Americans die every day from heroin overdoses. From rural farm communities to our urban cities to the suburbs, this disease of addiction impacts families from all backgrounds in every county across our state. My family knows that all too well because our son Tyler died from a heroin overdose in 2011.

My family lives in a suburb of Columbus called Pickerington, where Tyler went to high school. He was the type of kid that every parent dreams of having. Tyler was offered a scholarship to play football at the University of Akron - where he achieved his dreams of playing Division I college football. After suffering a shoulder injury in 2009, Tyler became addicted to prescription pain pills, stopped playing football, lost his scholarship, and eventually returned home to go to rehab. Less than 24 hours after returning home from rehab, we discovered that Tyler had accidentally overdosed.

Tyler's story is sadly all too common, and I don’t want to meet any more parents in a grief support group. That’s why we founded a group called [Tyler’s Light](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftylerslight.com%2F&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tyler_blast&n=1). Our mission is to equip communities and our nation with information and resources to help people choose a drug-free life, while providing resources for family members and friends who are involved in the battle against addiction.

[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DQW3rHtdl4T4%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tyler_blast&n=2)
We are fortunate to have a partner in U.S. Senator Rob Portman. For over 20 years, Rob has been leading the charge on drug prevention and treatment efforts. In the Senate, Rob's bill - the Comprehensive Addiction and Recovery Act - recently passed by an overwhelming 94-1 margin. His bill expands education and prevention efforts, helps law enforcement reverse overdoses to save lives, and expands treatment and recovery programs.

Please [click here](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DQW3rHtdl4T4%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tyler_blast&n=3) to learn more about our story and Senator Portman's efforts to help fight this prescription drug and heroin epidemic. Sincerely, Wayne Campbell
Tyler's Light
Pickerington, Ohio [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tyler_blast&n=4)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tyler_blast&n=5)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tyler_blast&n=6). -=-=-

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I believe this very strongly
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
When we started this campaign, I emailed my supporters and said, "This campaign is not about Bernie Sanders. It's about a grassroots movement of Americans standing up and saying: 'Enough is enough. This country and our government belong to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires.'"
I believe that now more than ever.
**We still have a path to the nomination, and our plan is to win the pledged delegates in this primary.Next week five states vote, and there are A LOT of delegates up for grabs.** I am going to keep fighting for every vote, for every delegate, because each is a statement of support for the values we share. That's why I have to ask:
[**Can I count on you to add a $2.70 contribution to our campaign - right now - to help us win this primary and as a way of saying you will never stop fighting for the ideas that have powered our political revolution?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full")
The truth is that if we stand together, there is no limit to what we can accomplish. We can bring hope to the political process. We can make real change. People should not underestimate us.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full")**

* * *

From: Bernie Sanders
Date: April 30, 2015
Subject: Are you with me?
Sisters and Brothers -
I am writing to inform you that I will be a candidate for President of the United States. I ask for your support.
[**Add your $2.70 contribution in support of our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full")
For many months I have been traveling from coast to coast across our country, and have had the opportunity to meet with thousands of good, hard-working, and remarkable people. Like you and me, they are deeply concerned about the future of our country.
They wonder why they are working longer hours for lower wages. They worry about whether their kids will be able to afford college or get decent jobs. They fear that they may not have the savings to retire with dignity and security.
The challenges facing our country are enormous.
It's not just that, for forty years, the middle class has been disappearing. It's that 99% of all new income is going to the top 1%, and the grotesque level of wealth and income inequality today is worse than at any time since the late 1920s. The people at the top are grabbing all the new wealth and income for themselves, and the rest of America is being squeezed and left behind.
The disastrous decisions of the Supreme Court in the Citizens United case and in other related decisions are undermining the very foundations of American democracy, as billionaires rig the system by using their Super PACs to buy politicians and elections.
And the peril of global climate change, with catastrophic consequences, is the central challenge of our times and our planet.
The middle class in America is at a tipping point. It will not last another generation if we don't boldly change course now.
**After a year of travel, discussion and dialogue, I have decided to be a candidate for the Democratic nomination for president.** But let's be clear. This campaign is not about Bernie Sanders. It's about a grassroots movement of Americans standing up and saying: "Enough is enough. This country and our government belong to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires."
[**Our movement needs people like you involved to help it succeed. Add your $2.70 contribution in support of our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full")
I run not to oppose any man or woman, but to propose new and far-reaching policies to deal with the crises of our times. And I run because I know we must change course now, or risk losing the future for so many to the interests of so few.
**A successful national campaign is a massive undertaking, especially when we will be heavily outspent**. It will require the active participation of millions of Americans in every community in our country. In fact, it will require nothing less than a political revolution which combats the demoralization and alienation of so many of our people from the political process.
Let me be very honest. It may be too late to stop the billionaire class from trying to buy the Presidency and Congress. The forces of greed already may be too powerful.
But we owe it to our children and grandchildren to try. We owe it to them to make the fight and, through the power of our numbers, turn back this assault on the foundation of our democracy and our future.
**We are at a moment of truth.** We need to face up to the reality of where we are as a nation, and we need a mass movement of people to fight for change.
I believe America is ready for a new path to the future.
On May 26th I will formally launch our campaign at the City Hall in Burlington, Vermont, where I served as Mayor.
[**I ask you to join with me in our campaign for President of the United States.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full")
Sincerely,
Senator Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full-bot "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-are-at-a-moment-of-truth?refcode=em160420-s1-full-bot")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: Thank you for standing by my side

body:
What this team is working toward: | Friend --

I'm proud that ours is the biggest, most diverse team in this election -- and we showed our strength with our big win in New York last night.

We’re fighting to build a better future for all American families -- no matter where you come from, what you look like, or who you love. We face serious problems, from rising college tuitions to deportations to gun violence plaguing our communities. But we don’t just need diagnoses -- we need real solutions. That’s what this team is working toward.

I'm so glad you’re here. Because of you, we're closer than ever to winning this primary -- but we can't lose momentum now. **We have five big contests next week in Pennsylvania, Maryland, and more. name: John Kasich
subject: A Big Milestone
body:
Today was an important milestone in this primary. We've been
saying it for weeks now but the media is finally acknowledging
that Ted Cruz is mathematically eliminated from securing the
nomination before the convention.

Peter, today was an important
milestone in this primary. We've been saying it for weeks now but
the media is finally acknowledging that Ted Cruz is
mathematically eliminated from securing the nomination before the
convention.

Help us raise the resources to
continue gathering delegates in upcoming states and deny Trump
from reaching 1,237.

We've launched a goal of raising
another $100,000 by Friday evening to fund our Get-Out-The-Vote
programs for next Tuesday's five primary states. Can you chip in
$25 or more to help?

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Our team released a strategy memo
today to offer guidance to the #NeverTrump movement about how
they can help. We're hopeful that they consider our
recommendations and support our campaign.

Peter - 15 polls in a row show
I'm the only candidate who can defeat Hillary Clinton. Chip in
right now to help us grow our momentum before the convention!
Thank you for your support!

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate

subject: DSCC is at my six - to bear false witness
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199e7/3476a20e/d974f57/27426238/2285915795/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, With $4.2 million of outside money supplied against me by DSCC (Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee) and other democratic groups, my opponent unfortunately changed her tone with a series of false TV ads, supported by the DC Democratic establishment. Proven wrong by independent fact checkers, these negative ads represent why people have lost trust in politicians, and know it is all about themselves winning - not the people. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199e7/3476a20e/d974f57/27426227/2285915795/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0420FB2b1&amounts=15,35,60,100,250,500,1000")
---
_Adding to the lack of trust, what my opponent is falsely attacking me for is what she has actually done - not me!_
I. My opponent's ads falsely claim I let CEOs pay themselves unlimited bonuses using bailout money, when I actually voted to force CEOs to return their bonuses to the taxpayers. My opponent also fails to mention that the _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ pointed out that she was actually the Vice President of a Wall Street firm specializing in investment and trading, while I voted for the toughest Wall Street reform legislation in history (Dodd-Frank).
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199e7/3476a20e/d974f57/27426226/2285915795/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0420FB2b2&amounts=15,35,60,100,250,500,1000")
---
II. While fact checkers found false my opponent's assertion that I would not protect Social Security benefits, she described as "a good thing" a budget that raised taxes on Social Security recipients as reported by _The Philadelphia Inquirer_.
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199e7/3476a20e/d974f57/27426225/2285915795/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0420FB2b3&amounts=15,35,60,100,250,500,1000")
---
Peter, I would like most to bring an integrity of service to Washington DC that regains the trust of the people. The false attack ads by my opponent and the DC Democratic establishment, compounded by the hypocrisy of those false claims goes against this grain of trust ... as people are once again presented a DC establishment and their candidate that are all about themselves winning - not the people.
I don't just want to win this election, I want to _govern._ And to govern, you have to earn the trust of the people by being accountable to them for what you say, and do.
[I ask that you contribute today to my campaign - $15, $35, $60, $100, or whatever you can - so that I can be part of the team that brings accountability back to Washington by putting people above politics, party, and type - and where honesty matters, once again.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199e7/3476a20e/d974f57/27426224/2285915795/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0420FB2p1&amounts=15,35,60,100,250,500,1000")
We will win this primary, but it will only be because of people like you who stand up to the false attacks, reject the hypocrisy, and speak truth to the outside DC political powers that are trying to buy this election.
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199e7/3476a20e/d974f57/27426223/2285915795/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0420FB2b4&amounts=15,35,60,100,250,500,1000")
---
Warmly,
Joe

name: Senator Bob Casey
subject: Why I’m supporting Katie
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5454571512021385216/-3147711574811082752?refcode=e20160420.4&refcode2=e20160420.4nd&amount=25)
---
Friend,

I know as well as anybody: Making progress for the middle class in the U.S. Senate is very difficult.

To pass legislation that puts working families first -- rather than special interests -- we must elect a new senator who has a record of getting results and who understands the challenge Pennsylvania families confront every day.

**That 's Katie McGinty and I'm proud to support her for Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator.**

[**Katie 's primary is coming up on April 26th and she needs your grassroots support right now. Will you chip in $5 right now to elect Katie?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5454571512021385216/-3147711574811082752?refcode=e20160420.4&refcode2=e20160420.4nd&amount=25)

Katie is the best person for this job. She's lived the struggle that working families face: Raised in working class Philadelphia, she became the first in her family to graduate from a four-year college. She went on to dedicate her career to protecting the environment and fighting for families, improving lives both in Pennsylvania and across our nation.

**And here 's another reason I'm supporting Katie:** If Republicans retain their majority in the next Senate, then the agendas of a President Donald Trump or Ted Cruz and the extreme right could become a reality. We can't let that happen. **We 've got to do everything we can to take back our Democratic Senate majority and I know Katie is the best candidate Democrats have to take on the GOP and win in November.**

But before we can talk about November, we have to help Katie win her April 26th primary. [**Will you join me in supporting Katie for Senate by contributing to her campaign today? Every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5454571512021385216/-3147711574811082752?refcode=e20160420.4&refcode2=e20160420.4nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Bob Casey
Pennsylvania U.S. Senator

name: Team Sestak
subject: Another first
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199fa/3476a20e/d97eced/274260cd/1413473018/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, A reporter last night asked Joe at the end of an interview: "Will you come in first?" Joe answered quietly, "yes." But there are a lot of quiet "firsts" for Joe that lend credence to his quiet assurance:
* First in his class in Cardinal O'Hara High School
* First in his school to go to the U.S. Naval Academy
* First in his Naval Academy class to select sea duty
* First-rated officer on each of his ships
* First naval officer to go to Harvard for a doctorate since Vietnam
* First-rated command surface ship in the Atlantic Fleet
* First group in his class to make Admiral
* First to lead the Navy's anti-terrorism unit, Deep Blue, after 9/11
* First Democrat elected to Congress from his Republican district since Watergate
* First Congressman to keep his office open 7 days a week to help people
* First elder abuse legislation to pass the house in 17 years
* First movement of federal money into autism in 12 years
* First-rated in his Congressional class due to legislation and constituent service
* First to win re-election in a nearly 2 to 1 GOP district without spending any money on any ads
* First person to beat Senator Arlen Specter
* First Admiral to serve on Ploughshares board for nuclear disarmament
* First public servant to walk across Pennsylvania in the shoes of the people
* **....First Democrat to have $4.2 million in Democratic DC money spent against him because of the personal whim of one DC Senator.**

[Peter, we will finish first on April 26th, but we need your help to do it. Please help us keep our TV ads on the air by chipping in $10, $20, $30, $40, $50 or whatever you can do today - help Joe so that the people are always first!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199fa/3476a20e/d97eced/274260cc/1413473018/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0420FB3p1&amounts=10,20,30,40,50,100,1000") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199fa/3476a20e/d97eced/274260cb/1413473018/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0420FB3b1&amounts=10,20,30,40,50,100,1000")

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: How we win in Maryland on Tuesday
body:
#
Bernie Supporter -
There are two kinds of power in politics: organized people and organized money.
Thanks to more than 7 million individual contributions, we're raising the kind of money needed to take on the billionaire class. But this weekend -- before the people of Maryland vote on Tuesday, April 26 -- we need to really focus on organizing people.
We're running the largest grassroots campaign in the history of presidential politics, and **if every person who has signed up to support Bernie takes just a few hours over the weekend to tell uncommitted voters about why they 're part of this political revolution, we're going to win in Maryland on Tuesday.**
RSVP today to an event happening near you:
**[Phone BAnking for Bernie:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44gw5)
Thursday, April 21st in Silver Spring **
**[Rockville Phonebank:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44sb2)
Friday, April 22nd in Rockville **
**[Get Out the Vote For Bernie!:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44qvg)
Saturday, April 23rd in Chevy Chase **
**[Get Out the Vote For Bernie!:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/44qv4)
Sunday, April 24th in Chevy Chase **
**[FIND OTHER EVENTS»](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassingl "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=official-event&f%5B%5D=phonebank&f%5B%5D=gotv&f%5B%5D=canvassingl")**
This is such an important stretch for our campaign. If we can win in Maryland and do well in the other states voting on April 26, we'll be well on our way toward winning this primary, the White House, and taking back our country from the billionaire class.
